creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-i386->freebsd-bugs

I am  not sure whether this is a 6.4 issue, can you please vaporize /usr/src and /usr/obj 
and pick a different mirror to cvsup the updates from (or use csup!), there are no other 
reports that this doesn't work so that implies local problems. Thanks!
